creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
On Mon, March 10, 2008 7:24 pm, Agnius wrote:
>

Hello,

The report is rather useless without the backtrace information et all. Can
you please visit
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug.html
for more information on how to debug the kernel? Can you please reply-all
the results from a bt (backtrace) etc? that way we might be able to see
what is going on.

Thanks,
remko
